summary: AI coding contract: follow AGENTS.md. For every feature/bugfix: identify changed surface, add same-area tests, preserve coverage ratchet, use appropriate test types (unit/API/Testing Library/E2E), include mock/fixture tests for agent loop paths, run narrow check + bun run verify before claiming complete. Handoff must include changed files, tests added, coverage report path, E2E/live evidence or blocker, known residual risk.
